subject: F9.RED: write tests/hsim/test_hsim_profile_cluster.sh
description: Write the RED test for ./hsim profile and ./hsim cluster. Same shape as test_hsim_demo.sh. Assertions: --help shows both subcmds; --dry-run prints resolved cmd without execution; bogus invocation -> rc=2; missing artifact -> rc=2 with 'not built' hint; real run on icount_spin.elf produces a non-empty BBV with expected row count; cluster then writes non-empty simpts + weights.
activeForm: Writing RED test for profile + cluster
